data_maps_VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1.VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Tra: I daresay a TRAINER isn't qualified if\nPOKéMON aren't settled and friendly.\lHave you given them any {POKEBLOCK}S?
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1.VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_All: Let me hazard a guess why you're in\nVERDANTURF. The reason: CONTESTS.\pAll CONTEST challenges originate here.
